mapper.insert: INSERT INTO public.lostark_calendar_sync_logs ( id, sync_type, status, week_start_date, week_end_date, fetched_count, filtered_count, saved_count, message, error_message, started_at, finished_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS uuid), #{syncType}, #{status}, #{weekStartDate}, #{weekEndDate}, #{fetchedCount}, #{filteredCount}, #{savedCount}, #{message}, #{errorMessage}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE public.lostark_calendar_sync_logs SET week_start_date = #{weekStartDate}, week_end_date = #{weekEndDate}, fetched_count = #{fetchedCount}, filtered_count = #{filteredCount}, saved_count = #{savedCount}, status = 'SUCCESS', message = #{message}, error_message = NULL, finished_at = #{finishedAt} WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)

UPDATE public.lostark_calendar_sync_logs SET week_start_date = #{weekStartDate}, week_end_date = #{weekEndDate}, fetched_count = #{fetchedCount}, filtered_count = #{filteredCount}, saved_count = #{savedCount}, status = 'FAIL', message = #{message}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, finished_at = #{finishedAt} WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
